error_signature: Gmail Trigger not executing with 'Only unread emails' enabled
title: Gmail Trigger fails to execute with unread filter
symptom: The Gmail Trigger node does not execute the workflow when 'Only unread emails' is enabled, despite new emails arriving in the inbox.
not_this_if: Trigger works when filter is disabled
Emails are marked as unread before reaching n8n
root_cause: The Gmail Trigger does not recognize emails as 'unread' if they are automatically marked as such by scripts or if they land in the Spam folder. This prevents the trigger from executing the workflow as expected.
fix_steps: Disable the 'Only unread emails' filter in the Gmail Trigger settings
Test the workflow to confirm it executes with all emails
agent_instruction: Disable the 'Only unread emails' filter in the Gmail Trigger settings to allow the workflow to execute.
